title: Teltonika RUT241 Industrial 4G/LTE WiFi Router
description: RUT241 is a compact and secure industrial 4G/LTE WiFi router with a favorable price for professional installations The router delivers high performance for mobile communication with great importance even in demanding conditions where a wide range of operating temperatures is needed The device is equipped with two Ethernet ports , a SIM slot, a digital input/output and an LED signal strength indicator. Network deployment and subsequent management are simple SMA connectors for connecting external antennas allow the antenna to be placed in a suitable place to achieve the highest possible level of the received signal. The RUT241 supports advanced security features and is often used as a 4G backup. Remote connection, Out-of-Band management, advanced VPN functions and tunnel support make it an ideal device for IoT networks Device (2) GSM antenna WiFi antenna UTP cable Power supply
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz, LTE WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 150 Connectors and Interfaces WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps LAN/WAN RF connectors (1) RSMA female, (2) SMA female LAN speed (2) 10/100Mbps (1x LAN/WAN) SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 Power Power type DC connector Max. power consumption [W] 6,5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 125 Width [mm] 83 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 74 Hardware CPU MT7628 CPU frequency [MHz] 580 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 128
